name: hadith-json
description: Database JSON hadits berisi 50.884 hadits dari 17 kitab utama dengan output terpisah per locale (ar, en, id placeholder) pada struktur v2.

scripts.generate:id: tsup src/generateIndonesian.ts --format cjs --sourcemap --out-dir dist --clean false && node dist/generateIndonesian.js
scripts.validate:id: tsup src/validateIndonesian.ts --format cjs --sourcemap --out-dir dist --clean false && node dist/validateIndonesian.js
scripts.fix:id: npm run generate:id:force && npm run validate:id
